title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. VLCCs Remains Supported as Charterers Consider New Trade Barriers - Following a subdued start to October, the VLCC segment shows early signs of support.
